allow: PowerShell(git --version; gh --version; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum | Select-Object Count, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Sum/1MB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 50MB } | Select-Object @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}, FullName; Write-Output "--- top dirs ---"; Get-ChildItem -Directory | ForEach-Object { $s=\(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Dir=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($s/1MB,2\)} })
PowerShell(git --no-pager diff --stat; Write-Output "--- so bai social con lai ---"; \(Select-String -Path "creative-portfolio.html" -Pattern 'data-cat="social"'\).Count)
